svg.title: Optical pH Sensor v2.1 — PCB functional block schematic
svg.desc: Block schematic showing four PCB zones: Logic zone with ESP32 DevKit and TCS34725 RGB sensor; Optical driver zone with 2N2222 LED circuit; Power delivery zone with 12V input and LM2596 buck converter; Pump driver zone with three IRLZ44N MOSFET circuits and screw terminals.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain TCS34725 wiring in detail: SDA on GPIO21, SCL on GPIO22, VIN from 3V3. Include pull-up resistors and I2C address.')
sendPrompt('Show me the complete ESP32 pin assignment table for the optical pH sensor: GPIO21 SDA, GPIO22 SCL, GPIO2 LED, GPIO4 Pump1, GPIO32 Pump2 PWM, GPIO18 Pump3 PWM, VIN, 3V3, GND')

sendPrompt('Why does the optical pH sensor use a 2N2222 transistor to drive the LEDs instead of GPIO directly? Explain base resistor 1kΩ, LED anode resistors 100Ω, 3V3 connection, and 40mA total current.')
sendPrompt('What connector type should I use for the 12V input on this PCB, and how does 12V route to both the LM2596 and the three MOSFET pump terminals?')
sendPrompt('How do I tune the LM2596 buck converter to exactly 5V for ESP32 VIN? Explain IN+, IN-, OUT+, OUT- connections and the adjusting trimmer pot.')

sendPrompt('Explain the full MOSFET driver circuit for Pump 1 water fill: IRLZ44N gate on GPIO4, 10kΩ pull-down to GND, 1N4007 flyback diode across pump terminals, screw terminal wiring at 12V and GND.')
sendPrompt('Explain MOSFET driver 2 for Pump 2 dye micro-dose: GPIO32 at 5kHz 35% PWM duty cycle (duty value 89/255), IRLZ44N, 1N4007 flyback diode, and NKP peristaltic pump wiring.')
sendPrompt('Explain MOSFET driver 3 for Pump 3 vacuum drain: GPIO18 at 5kHz 40% PWM (adjustable via /api/config), IRLZ44N, 1N4007, R385 diaphragm pump wiring.')
